summary: Enforce a fixed viewport-row floor for ordered drag and collision/reflow. The floor is derived from the relevant grid host clientHeight and is independent of scrollHeight, content height, or occupied rows.
direct_drag: ordered-drag-runtime snapshotCommittedPageBottom consumes viewportRowFloorForLayout and passes rowLimit into preview and final commit calls.
collision_reflow: collision-reflow consumes viewportRowFloorForLayout by default and rowLimit from drag callers; sparse-slot, local displacement, vertical fallback, active drop, and expanded drop paths reject or rollback placements below the floor.
panel_expansion_exception: applyVerticalPanelExpansion and explicit insertion pushdown remain outside the drag rowLimit path; existing panel expansion scroll test passed.
ratchet_canary: electron GUI keeps drag cursor aligned and prevents drag-created vertical growth now repeats a collapsed-panel collision at the floor three times and asserts max bottom, scrollHeight, and grid height do not grow past the viewport floor.
